sourceMovie.title: Greta
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Greta (2019) as a mystery theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The mystery and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Disturbia
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Greta clicked for you, Disturbia (2007) is a strong next stop: both trade in mystery and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Greta?
faq.answer: Try Disturbia, Remember, The Good Doctor—each shares DNA with Greta while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Greta?
faq.answer: Greta (2019) is best described as Mystery, Thriller, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Greta worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this mystery lane.
